description: You are a mission analyst investigating a suspected anomaly where thermal fluctuations in the INST satellite may be correlated with attitude control system drift. Analyze the correlation between the thermal subsystem (HEALTH_STATUS packet: TEMP1, TEMP2, TEMP3, TEMP4) and the attitude determination subsystem (ADCS packet: Q1, Q2) using at least 20 time-synchronized telemetry samples spaced approximately 1 second apart. Compute a 6x6 Pearson correlation matrix for these items and identify cross-subsystem correlations (pairs where one item is from HEALTH_STATUS and the other from ADCS). Save a structured report to /home/ga/Desktop/correlation_report.json containing: 'sample_count' (integer >= 20), 'items' (list of exactly 6 strings:
